name: @trustlayer/backend
description: TrustLayer backend — Yandex Cloud Function handlers for risk analysis.

scripts.package: npm run build && rm -rf package.zip dist/node_modules && printf '{"type":"module"}' > dist/package.json && (cd dist && npm install --no-save --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund --prefix . @supabase/supabase-js) && cd dist && zip -rq ../package.zip .
